ddls:
CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "animal_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each animal */,
  "animal_type" TEXT /* Type of animal (e.g., Cat, Dog) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the animal */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the animal */,
  "color1" TEXT /* Primary color of the animal */,
  "color2" TEXT /* Secondary color of the animal */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the animal */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the animal (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the animal */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* General health status of the animal */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the animal entered the shelter */,
  "microchip_id" TEXT /* Microchip ID of the animal */,
  "spayed_neutered" INTEGER /* Whether the animal has been spayed or neutered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_animal_type FOREIGN KEY ("animal_type") REFERENCES animal_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_breed FOREIGN KEY ("breed") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the animal type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the animal type */,
  "average_lifespan" TEXT /* Average lifespan of the animal type */,
  "common_health_issues" TEXT /* Common health issues associated with the animal type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* Image URL for the animal type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breeds" (
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breed */,
  "breed_name" TEXT /* Name of the breed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the breed */,
  "average_weight" TEXT /* Average weight of the breed */,
  "temperament" TEXT /* Typical temperament of the breed */,
  "lifespan" TEXT /* Average lifespan of the breed */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* Image URL for the breed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "animal_id" TEXT /* ID of the animal associated with the outcome */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., Adoption, Transfer) */,
  "outcome_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of outcome (e.g., Partner, Offsite) */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  "outcome_location" TEXT /* Location where the outcome occurred */,
  "outcome_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the outcome */,
  "outcome_status" TEXT /* Status of the outcome (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_outcome_subtype FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_subtype") REFERENCES outcome_subtypes ("subtype_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_outcome_type FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_type") REFERENCES outcome_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcome_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome type */,
  "outcome_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the outcome (e.g., days, weeks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcome_subtypes" (
  "subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome subtype */,
  "subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome subtype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome subtype */,
  "subtype_duration" TEXT /* Duration specific to the subtype (e.g., days, weeks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteers" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer */,
  "volunteer_name" TEXT /* Name of the volunteer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the volunteer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the volunteer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the volunteer (e.g., Animal Care, Adoption Counselor) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the volunteer */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the volunteer (e.g., days and times) */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the volunteer */,
  "training_completed" INTEGER /* Whether the volunteer has completed necessary training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "animal_id" TEXT /* ID of the animal associated with the vaccination */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccination (e.g., Rabies, Distemper) */,
  "next_due_date" TEXT /* Next due date for the vaccination */,
  "vaccination_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the vaccination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_vaccinations_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_medical_records" (
  "medical_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "animal_id" TEXT /* ID of the animal associated with the medical record */,
  "medical_condition" TEXT /* Medical condition of the animal */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment prescribed for the animal */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the next follow-up */,
  "medical_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the medical record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_medical_records_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adoption_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adoption application */,
  "animal_id" TEXT /* ID of the animal associated with the application */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant */,
  "applicant_email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "home_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the home visit */,
  "home_visit_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the home visit */,
  "adoption_fee" REAL /* Adoption fee paid by the adopter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoption_applications_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteer_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volunteer associated with the assignment */,
  "animal_id" TEXT /* ID of the animal associated with the assignment */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was made */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of assignment (e.g., Animal Care, Adoption Counseling) */,
  "assignment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the assignment */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volunteer_assignments_volunteer_id FOREIGN KEY ("volunteer_id") REFERENCES volunteers ("volunteer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volunteer_assignments_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Shelter Manager, Adoption Counselor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the user account was modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
